text.title: API Integration Testing: FastAPI
text.summary: FastAPI TestClient for synchronous tests, AsyncClient via ASGITransport for async tests; both use dependency_overrides to inject the test database session.

rule.statement: Override the get_db dependency with a fixture that yields the test session; clear overrides in teardown; never call the app directly without the override — the test will use the production database.
rule.rationale: dependency_overrides is FastAPI's injection replacement mechanism. Without clearing it after the test, overrides leak into subsequent tests.

section.title: FastAPI AsyncClient (Async)

rule.statement: Use httpx.AsyncClient with ASGITransport for async endpoint tests; mark tests with @pytest.mark.anyio; override dependencies the same way as synchronous tests.
rule.rationale: TestClient runs the ASGI app in a thread. AsyncClient drives it in the same event loop, which is required when the application code uses async database drivers (asyncpg, motor) that cannot be called from a thread.

section.reference: Full FastAPI sync + async client fixtures
